title: PDF export via Playwright
steps: Install Playwright + Chromium on EC2 server (~400MB)
Create POST /api/export/pdf endpoint — receives HTML string, renders via Playwright at 1920x1080, outputs multi-page PDF
Add PDF option to ExportButton dropdown in frontend
Update deploy.sh to install Playwright on server
acceptance_criteria: PDF export produces clean multi-page PDF with one slide per page
Theme and accent colors preserved in PDF
Export completes in under 10 seconds for a 10-slide deck

context.deferred_from: TASK-009 discussion. HTML export ships first (client-side). PDF is a fast-follow.
context.dependency: Requires Playwright + headless Chromium on EC2. ~400MB install.
